human_required.expected_evidence: Acceptance note with screenshots/recording or issue list.
human_required.required_human_action: JiYong/Tars uses the VS1 UI flow and records accept or reject.
human_required.why_ai_cannot_verify: Human operator UX acceptance is subjective.

human_required.expected_evidence: Domain review note with accepted/rejected labels and issues.
human_required.release_impact: Blocks domain-ready VS1 claim for that domain.
human_required.required_human_action: Domain owner reviews labels, relationships, and object profiles.

human_required.expected_evidence: Redacted provider transcript, approval result, and audit refs.

scenario_results.notes: Artifact/Search are the entry points before ontology modeling.
Universal seed types are present.
SuggestionSet contains object/property/link candidates.
Object suggestions include evidence spans and confidence.
Property suggestions include evidence and values.
Link suggestions include endpoints, relation, and evidence.
Uncertainty/evidence gaps are visible.
Review supports select/reject/defer.
Unpromoted suggestions cannot become truth.
Promotion is explicit and user-controlled.
Promotion creates versioned ChangeSet.
SemVer bump is meaningful.
Promoted objects have stable IDs and source mapping.
Conflicts are visible and not silently overwritten.
Object profile is usable.
Search integrates promoted objects.
Artifact Viewer shows promoted context.
Claims can reference objects as context but still require Evidence Bundle.
Actions show ontology impact and remain local/mock.
Audit covers ontology lifecycle.
Versioned correction/supersede path creates patch ChangeSet.
Multi-domain evidence uses the same universal core.
Drop/Search remains first value; modeling is not forced.
Prompt-injection content cannot promote ontology.
LLM/suggestion output is not ontology truth.
Cross-namespace promotion is denied.
Low-confidence candidates stay draft.
Duplicate/merge rules preserve evidence.
Existing VS0 gates remain green.
Production/live-provider/human UX claims remain out of scope.
Ontology suggestions do not replace Evidence Bundles.
Invalid ontology graph returns helpful failure.
Human operator UX acceptance remains subjective.
Domain semantic quality requires human/domain judgment.
Production/live connector proof requires credentials, approval, and external state.
